title: CeDiRNet-STEM
description: Center and particle-radius estimation for STEM images

manifest.title: Dataset manifest
manifest.description: Training manifest containing 'train' and optionally 'test' lists. Each item has 'image_path' (the BF image), 'points', and optionally 'haadf_image_path'. If 'haadf_image_path' is omitted, the HAADF image is resolved by replacing '_BF.' with '_HAADF.' in the BF filename; both files are required. Inputs are combined exactly as upstream CeDiRNet-STEM expects: BF grayscale, HAADF grayscale, and a zero third channel. A point-radius annotation is [x, y, radius]. Toolbox Vector exports [x, y, radius_x, radius_y], where the distance from the center to the second vertex is used as radius.

model.title: Weights
model.description: Path to a CeDiRNet-STEM model checkpoint. The stock upstream radius+circularity checkpoint is accepted; its shared center-direction and radius tensors are loaded while the circularity-only head is ignored. For training, this is an optional initialization checkpoint.

localisation.title: Localisation weights
localisation.description: Optional path to a pretrained CeDiRNet localisation-head checkpoint.

score_threshold.title: Score threshold
score_threshold.description: Minimum center confidence returned during inference.

width.title: Image width
width.description: Network input width; must be divisible by 32.

height.title: Image height
height.description: Network input height; must be divisible by 32.
